# Ruletaa - Spin the Random Wheel Online

> Ruletaa is a user-friendly web app that lets you create and spin customizable random wheels for decisions, games, and prize draws. Enjoy fair, instant, and private results on any device.

## Core Content
- [Random Wheel](https://ruletaa.net): Create and spin your own random wheel for making decisions, picking names, or choosing prizes.
- [Random Color Wheel](https://ruletaa.net/colors): Spin a wheel to randomly select colors for games, design, or fun.
- [Random Number Wheel](https://ruletaa.net/numbers): Instantly generate random numbers for games, learning, or decision-making.
- [Random Number Wheel From 1-10](https://ruletaa.net/numbers/1-10): Generate random numbers between 1 and 10 instantly for games, education, or quick decision-making.
- [Random Number Wheel From 1-100](https://ruletaa.net/numbers/1-100): Generate random numbers between 1 and 100 instantly for games, education, or quick decision-making.
- [Yes or No Wheel Wheel](https://ruletaa.net/yes-no): Make quick binary decisions with a simple spin of the wheel, perfect for resolving dilemmas or adding fun to group activities.
- [Category](https://ruletaa.net/category): Browse our collection of pre-made random wheel templates and choose a template to save time and get started in seconds.
- [Blog](https://ruletaa.net/blog): Get better at random decision-making with detailed tutorials and case studies.
- [Changelog](https://ruletaa.net/changelog): See the latest updates and improvements to Ruletaa.
- [Feedback](https://ruletaa.net/feedback): Get in touch with the Ruletaa team for support, feedback, or partnerships.

## Key Resources
- [Privacy Policy](https://ruletaa.net/privacy): Learn how your data is protected and how we ensure your privacy.
- [Terms of Service](https://ruletaa.net/terms): Understand the rules and guidelines for using Ruletaa.
- [About Us](https://ruletaa.net/about): Discover our story, mission, and team.
